creator: egypcio@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Baptiste Daroussin from comment #2)

I got #230990 to use this one, and as I thought it could be pretty useful to present it to others as the PKGSRC master sites makes use of the NetBSD CDN.

but, if you guys see no reason to use it I can just take it out and modify the port I updated - setting MASTER_SITES= manually.

thanks for the feedback! appreciated though
